title: gastridium australe
intro: Gastridium australe, also known as Australian rice grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Gastridium australe include the potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as asthma. Gastridium australe can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which can be taken orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
